lines: A Lumen Compact medicine crate, lid stamped with the clean-hands sigil and a batch code. Field doctrine, not scripture.
Inside: sealed dressings and one suppressant vial the Choir somehow did not take. The manifest slip is annotated in a fast Compact hand.
"Sample yield from this site exceeds model. Recommend the chapel not be reported to the Remnant until a team can recover the cross subject. Do not let the censors burn it first."
